---
title: 'Topic: white  You Dr. Briar, like this experiment,...'
date: '2014-12-31T12:24:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'It''s Author Fun'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '8862092174765937713'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/It_s Author Fun/feed.atom'
---

Topic: white<br><br>You Dr. Briar, like this experiment, were always temporary and expendable.
